{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Skysworn weapons
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Skysworn weapons]] are keyed to the individual user or the armor and can be located or deactivated remotely.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
